title: Sreenarayanapuram Temple
tagline: Sreenarayanapuram Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sreenarayanapuram Mahavishnu Temple is an ancient Vishnu temple in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Sreenarayanapuram Mahavishnu Temple is an ancient Vishnu temple in Kerala, India. It is at Manakala (in Pathanamthitta) about 4 km (2.5 mi) from Adoor.

topPlaces.name: Manamboor
topPlaces.description: Manambur is a village in Varkala Taluk of Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 9 km south-east of Varkala Town and 35 km north of State Capital city Trivandrum.

topPlaces.name: Palachira
topPlaces.description: Palachira is a suburb of Varkala Town. It is situated 2.8km south of Varkala Town.

topPlaces.name: Ottoor
topPlaces.description: Ottoor is a panchayath in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 7km south-east of Varkala city and 36km north of capital city Trivandrum.

topPlaces.name: Vennicode
topPlaces.description: Vennicode is an area of Cheruniyoor panchayat in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram District State of Kerala in India. The Nearest Railway Station is Akathumuri railway station and Airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport.

topPlaces.name: Chemmaruthy
topPlaces.description: Chemmaruthy is a panchayat in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. It is 7 km east of Varkala city centre and 40 km north of state capital Trivandrum.

topPlaces.name: Ponganadu
topPlaces.description: Ponganadu is a village in the Thiruvananthapuram district, situated in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Karavaram
topPlaces.description: Karavaram is a village in Chirayinkeezhu Taluk of Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Cherunniyoor
topPlaces.description: Cherunniyoor is a village in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.It is situated 3.4km south of Varkala Town center and also one of 5 panchayats that shares border with Varkala municipality. Palachira and Vadaserikonam junctions in cheruniyoor panchayat is two of the fastest urbanizing suburbs of Varkala.

items.note: Manambur is a village in Varkala Taluk of Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 9 km south-east of Varkala Town and 35 km north of State Capital city Trivandrum.
Palachira is a suburb of Varkala Town. It is situated 2.8km south of Varkala Town.
Ottoor is a panchayath in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated 7km south-east of Varkala city and 36km north of capital city Trivandrum.

Vennicode is an area of Cheruniyoor panchayat in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram District State of Kerala in India. The Nearest Railway Station is Akathumuri railway station and Airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport.
Chemmaruthy is a panchayat in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India. It is 7 km east of Varkala city centre and 40 km north of state capital Trivandrum.
Ponganadu is a village in the Thiruvananthapuram district, situated in the Indian state of Kerala.
Karavaram is a village in Chirayinkeezhu Taluk of Trivandrum district in the state of Kerala, India.

Cherunniyoor is a village in Varkala Taluk of Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India.It is situated 3.4km south of Varkala Town center and also one of 5 panchayats that shares border with Varkala municipality. Palachira and Vadaserikonam junctions in cheruniyoor panchayat is two of the fastest urbanizing suburbs of Varkala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sreenarayanapuram Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sreenarayanapuram Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sreenarayanapuram Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (33 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sreenarayanapuram Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sreenarayanapuram Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sreenarayanapuram Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sreenarayanapuram Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sreenarayanapuram Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manamboor, Palachira, Ottoor, Vennicode, Chemmaruthy.
